title: Star Wars Scrapbook: The Essential Collection
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{Book |not_appearance=1 |image=[[File:Essential_Collection_Scrapbook.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Scrapbook:
The Essential Collection'' |author=[[Stephen J. Sansweet]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Chronicle Books]] |early release= |release date=[[April]] [[1998]]{{Amazon|url=Star-Wars-Scrapbook-Essential-Collection/dp/0811820602|text=Star Wars Scrapbook: The Essential Collection}} |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Hardcover spiral |pages=84 |isbn=0811820602 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline= |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars Scrapbook: The Essential Collection''''' is an 84-page hardcover spiral book that shows off the best of [[Stephen J. Sansweet]]'s ''[[Star Wars]]'' collection, containing many pictures along with several stickers and a punch-out [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing starfighter]]. {{Book-stub}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars Scrapbook: The Essential Collection}} *{{CollectorCite|3|Around the Galaxy}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Amazon|url=Star-Wars-Scrapbook-Essential-Collection/dp/0811820602|text=Star Wars Scrapbook: The Essential Collection}} [[Category:Scrapbooks]]
